description: CompositionWhite T-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, is engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has a round neck, short sleeves, and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironFire up and don that sporty look with this LeBron James graphic T-shirt from nike. Crafted from soft cotton-polyester blend fabric and engineered with Dri-Fit technology, this T-shirt offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday wear. Team this tee with jeans and sneakers for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during winters.
